things.name: Half Moon Bay
things.description: Stunning crescent-shaped beach 30km from Dammam with shallow turquoise water and coral

things.name: Al-Ahsa Oasis
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage world's largest natural oasis with date palm groves and springs

things.name: Corniche Dammam
things.description: 6km waterfront promenade along the Arabian Gulf with parks and the globe roundabout

things.name: King Fahd Causeway
things.description: 25km causeway connecting Saudi Arabia to Bahrain across the Arabian Gulf

things.name: Tarout Island
things.description: Historic island with a Portuguese castle, 5,000-year-old ruins and traditional fishing village

things.name: Regional Museum of the Eastern Province
things.description: Archaeology and natural history of the Eastern Province from prehistoric times

things.name: Dammam Waterfront
things.description: Entertainment hub with restaurants, food trucks and the Marina Village

things.name: Ithra (King Abdulaziz Centre for World Culture)
things.description: Stunning cultural centre designed like stacked stones with a library and museum

things.name: Rahima Beach
things.description: Sandy beach north of the city with good swimming and calm conditions

things.name: Al-Khobar Al-Khabra Traditional Village
things.description: Reconstructed traditional fishing village demonstrating pre-oil Eastern Province life
